chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 45 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case. 28-02-2023 Mr. Barner Newton Barni, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, Addl.P.G. Respondents are present in person. ============= Omar Sial, J: Anwar Sardar Khan has filed this application seeking the setting aside of an order dated 20.12.20222 passed by the learned 7th Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi South. In terms of the said order, the respondents herein were admitted to pre-arrest bail. 2. I have asked the counsel as to the grounds on which he seeks cancellation. He has unfortunately not been able to give any reason however he repeats the contents of the allegations and says that bail should not have been granted. 3. It does not appear from the record or what the learned counsel said that there has been any misuse of the bail granted or that the respondents are tampering with evidence or that they are a flight risk or any defect in the impugned order. There is no complaint from the State that the respondents have not co-operated with the investigation officer. Prima facie it seems that these proceedings have been filed to settle personal vendettas. 4. Application stands dismissed. JUDGE
